title: Burzon
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
'''Burzon''' was one of the [[Marvel Comics]] letterers who lettered an issue of [[Star Wars (1977)|Marvel's ''Star Wars'']] comic series. This issue was Burzon's only professional work for Marvel Comics.

{{Artist-stub}}

==''Star Wars'' bibliography==
===Letterer===
*[[Star Wars (1977) 54|''Star Wars'' (1977) 54]]
